title: lophatherum gracile var. zeylanicum
intro: Lophatherum gracile var. zeylanicum, also known as Ceylonese or Ceylon grass, is a variant of the Lophatherum gracile plant species, a type of grass native to Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lophatherum gracile var. zeylanicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Lophatherum gracile var. zeylanicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use.
